name: Mexican Vegetable Stew
recipeIngredient: 1 sweet red pepper, cut into strips
1 sweet green pepper, cut into strips
1/4 teaspoon red pepper flakes, or to taste
2 cups fresh green beans, sliced into 1-inch pieces
1 can black beans, drained and rinsed
2 ears corn, cut into 1-inch pieces, or
1/2 cup cilantro, or flat leaf parsley
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the onion, red and green peppers, garlic, and broth in a large pot.
Bring to a boil.
2. Cover and simmer for 5 minutes.
3. Add the spices, red potatoes, and sweet potato. Cover and simmer for another
10 minutes, adding more broth or water if needed.
4. Add the green beans and cook for an additional 5 minutes.
5. Add the zucchini, yellow squash, black beans, corn, and lime juice.
6. Reduce the heat and let simmer for 5 more minutes, or until all vegetables
are tender.
7. Garnish with cilantro or parsley.
Serves 10 to 12 as a side dish, 4 to 6 as an entree.
